videos.title: Cross Country Skiing Championship held in Gulmarag
National Nordic Cross Country sking championship 2022 #Gulmarg Kashmir concluded today..Aadil Ahmad
videos.description:
National Nordic Cross Country sking championship 2022 #Gulmarg Kashmir concluded today. The championship was organized by Winter Games association of J&K in collaboration with of Jammu and Kashmir Sports council under the aegies of Ski and Snowboard Indian........ #JK24X7NEWS 

Reporter Live News.......... 

Reports By #Aadil Dar

videos.title: Solo In Gulmarg
videos.description:
☕️ Use the Code *RonnieLovesLatte* and get 15% Off on your order - https://sleepyowl.co/pages/latte

I'm back in Gulmarg, Kashmir for my winter pilgrimage but this time around I'm Riding Solo. 

Follow Sleepy Owl Coffee on Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/sleepyowlcoffee/

You can support us by signing up to join the R&B Squad - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2RD8S7cc0US-2W7FOnyz5w/join

If you like the Music in our vlogs - sign up here: http://share.mscbd.fm/ronnieandbarty  

Our MAIN CAMERA - https://amzn.to/2ZCjwFB
Handy GORILLAPOD - https://amzn.to/2NEiRBe
The MIC we use - https://amzn.to/34b9a35

For more details about our EQUIPMENT check out our AMAZON STORE - https://www.amazon.in/shop/ronnie_and_barty

Created by: Ronnie & Barty 
https://www.instagram.com/ronnie_and_barty/

videos.title: Nordic Skie Day 3
videos.description:
Nordic Skiing – Women’s 1.5 KM Sprint | Day 3

A high-speed sprint contest unfolded on the snow as athletes surged through the 1.5 KM course with explosive bursts and precise technique.

🥇 Gold – Bhavani T N | Karnataka
🥈 Silver – Renu Danu
🥉 Bronze – Kusum Rana

Quick acceleration and composed racing shaped the podium finish on the snowy tracks of Gulmarg.

videos.title: 03 Jan 2013 - Indian skiers to participate in Winter Olympics as independent athletes
videos.description: 03 Jan 2013 (ANI) - Indian skiers are all set to participate in Winter Olympics in Russia as independent competitors despite the suspension imposed on Indian Olympic Association by the international governing body.

videos.title: Nordic Ski Men Day 3
videos.description:
Nordic Skiing – Men’s 15 KM | Day 3
Kangdoori | Gulmarg

A grueling test of endurance marked the 15 KM Nordic race, with athletes maintaining relentless pace and stamina across the challenging course.

🥇 Mohd Ali – Army
🥈 Padma Namgail – Army
🥉 Sunny Singh – Army

The Army contingent once again dominated the podium, displaying remarkable strength, consistency, and control throughout the competition.
